subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous forts were built during the reign of Maharaja Jai Singh II?
question_hi: महाराजा जैसिंग प्रमाणी में बनायी गयी किस मंदिरों को।
explanation_en: The forts built during the reign of Maharaja Jai Singh II are Amber Fort and Chittorgarh Fort. Among the forts built by Maharaja Jai Singh II, Chittorgarh Fort is known for its historical significance. The forts built by Maharaja Jai Singh II are Amber Fort and Chittorgarh Fort.
explanation_hi: महाराजा जैसिंग II के राज्य में बना गया है अमेरिका मंदिर और चीटरगढ़ मंदिर
explanation_en: Among the forts built during the reign of Maharaja Jai Singh II, Chittorgarh Fort is known for its historical significance.
explanation_hi: महाराजा जैसिंग II के वर्षितरगढ़ मंदिर को हार्षितरगढ़ मंदिर के अभिप्रधारण के तथा चित्रगढ़ मंदिर
explanation_en: Chittor Fort and Chittorgarh Fort are significant historical forts built during the reign of Maharaja Jai Singh II. However, Chittorgarh Fort holds greater historical importance.
explanation_hi: महाराजा जैसिंग II के तथा चीट्रगढ़ मंदिर के अभिप्रधारण के तथा चित्रगढ़ मंदिर
